india_trends.title: South Korea and Taiwan close in on India's m-cap
india_trends.summary: Emerging market valuations are changing. South Korea and Taiwan are gaining ground on India, driven by the artificial intelligence chip sector. Their market values have seen significant growth. India's market capitalization has seen a slight decrease. This shift is influenced by key companies in the

india_trends.title: Mint Explainer | What is Lakshya 31, Larsen and Toubro's new five-year plan?
india_trends.summary: Larsen and Toubro Ltd's ambitious five-year plan, Lakshya 31, aims to double revenue and expand into cutting-edge sectors like green hydrogen and semiconductor manufacturing. As the company navigates challenges in return on equity, analysts weigh in on the feasibility of its targets.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Taiwan’s $286 Billion Pension Fund Trims Its Dollar Exposure
india_trends.summary: Taiwan’s largest pension fund has reduced some of its US currency exposure amid heightened market volatility and a broader global reassessment of dollar assets.

india_trends.title: Bajaj Auto posts record quarterly profit of Rs 2,746 crore on volume surge
india_trends.summary: Bajaj Auto achieved its highest-ever quarterly net profit of ₹2,746 crore. This record performance was fueled by strong vehicle sales across its brands. The company also saw significant growth in exports. Despite anticipating some industry slowdown, Bajaj Auto remains optimistic due to its strong pr

india_trends.title: US market today: Warner Bros Discovery's streaming growth accelerates on global HBO Max push
india_trends.summary: Warner Bros. Discovery's streaming unit exceeded revenue expectations, driven by HBO Max's international expansion and subscriber growth. india_trends.title: Foreign Demand for Treasury Debt Is Stalling, Trade Group Says
india_trends.summary: Foreign investors are showing signs of diversifying away from US Treasuries as debt levels mount, according to the financial industry’s global trade group.

india_trends.title: US stocks today: S&P 500 and Nasdaq notch records; AMD results spark AI stock rally
india_trends.summary: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq hit record highs Wednesday, fueled by Middle East conflict resolution hopes and strong AMD earnings boosting AI stocks. india_trends.title: Canada’s Carbon Tax Hinders Pipeline Plans, Cenovus CEO Says
india_trends.summary: Alberta’s planned oil pipeline to the west coast requires Canada to shift away from stricter climate policies and toward promoting greater oil production from new projects, Cenovus Energy Inc.’s chief executive officer said.

india_trends.title: Godrej Consumer flags short-term margin pain on crude costs
india_trends.summary: Godrej Consumer Products Ltd anticipates margin pressure in the coming quarters. Elevated crude oil prices are impacting input costs. india_trends.title: Top private hospitals may drop out of government health plans
india_trends.summary: Private hospitals in India are feeling the pinch as government health schemes yield diminishing returns. This downturn provokes a critical reassessment of how these institutions engage with such programs. Delays in payments, inadequate reimbursements, and imposed pricing caps are underscored as sign

india_trends.title: India's total exports hit record $863 billion in FY26, services surge 8.7%
india_trends.summary: India's services exports hit a record $421.3 billion in fiscal year 2026. This pushed total goods and services exports to an all-time high of $863.1 billion. Services exports saw an 8.7% increase. Merchandise exports also grew, contributing significantly. This performance highlights India's strong e

india_trends.title: 'India won't have to rely on foreign suppliers for new-gen refrigerant gas'
india_trends.summary: The new refrigerants called hydrofluoroolefins, or HFOs, are quickly replacing older hydrofluorocarbons, or HFCs, in the USA and Europe as they are believed to have zero ozone depletion potential. india_trends.title: Royal Enfield will expand outside Tamil Nadu, to set up unit in Andhra Pradesh
india_trends.summary: Royal Enfield is investing Rs 2,200 crore to build a new manufacturing facility and vendor park in Andhra Pradesh. This marks the company's first expansion outside Tamil Nadu. india_trends.title: ‘We are not going to do charity’: Kingfisher beer maker United Breweries plans to exit unprofitable states amid cost surge, pricing curbs
india_trends.summary: United Breweries, a major player in India's beer market, is preparing to withdraw from unprofitable regions due to soaring input costs and rigid state pricing controls. The company, facing a significant hit to profitability, will make tough decisions regarding supply, promotions, and market prioriti

india_trends.title: AI models raise telecom cyber threat concerns in India
india_trends.summary: Communications minister Jyotiraditya Scindia convened an unscheduled meeting last week with telecom companies and academia to understand the severity of the situation, and industry's cyber preparedness to tackle potential threats, the people said.

india_trends.title: L&T scales down 5-year targets
india_trends.summary: In a strategic pivot, Larsen and Toubro has recalibrated its ambitious Lakshya Plan 2031, now earmarking an impressive ₹43,000 crore for investment in the forthcoming five years. The adjustments signal a broader order book and highlighted uncertainties in Middle Eastern markets.

india_trends.title: Gold, silver cimb amid signs of West Asia de-escalation
india_trends.summary: Wednesday marked a notable rise in gold and silver prices as hopes for a truce in the West Asia conflict sent ripples through the market. Gold experienced a remarkable spike on the MCX platform, while silver futures also climbed higher. Market analysts pointed to a surge in investment interest for g
